title: Create PR for iteration 2.1
description:
## Objective
Open a PR from the feature branch into the base branch `s2-win-probability`.

## Implementation
1. All changes from Feature 2.1.A should already be on the feature branch `2.1-stage-probability` (worker should have committed per-task — verify with `git log s2-win-probability..HEAD --oneline`).
2. Push the branch: `git push -u origin 2.1-stage-probability`.
3. Open PR with gh CLI:
   - Title: "feat(deals): stage win probability + weighted column total"
   - Base: `s2-win-probability`
   - Body: short summary + bulleted test plan.
4. Wait for CI to pass before moving on. If CI fails, fix and push.

## Tests
PR is open and CI is green.
acceptance_criteria: PR exists targeting s2-win-probability, CI green
